ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model run was performed */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the model run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the model run
Date and time when the model run was performed
